name: Checksum Dragon
name_jp: チェックサム・ドラゴン
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then, gain LP equal to half this card's DEF. This Attack Position card cannot be destroyed by battle.
mnst_eff: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then, gain LP equal to half this card's DEF. This Attack Position card cannot be destroyed by battle.
eff: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then, gain LP equal to half this card's DEF. This Attack Position card cannot be destroyed by battle.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
